name: Heretic Studio (Heretic + Ollama + sidecar)
description: GPU pod: Heretic decensoring with auto-save, HTTP sidecar on 8888 for logs/GPU/chat. Ollama and LiteLLM are installed for shell experiments. Expose ports 8888 (sidecar), 11434 (ollama), 4000 (optional litellm).
readme: Fill HF_TOKEN. Use an image built from runpod/Dockerfile in this repo. Lower HERETIC_N_TRIALS for quick tests. Set SKIP_ORIGINAL_HF_SNAPSHOT=1 to skip the extra full-repo copy used for original-weights chat (saves time and disk on large models like Gemma-31B); Heretic still downloads the model once.
